hero2.description: Order your favorite organic blends and freshly baked pastries right to your table, or reserve a spot for your next coffee run.

card1.title: Signature Yelo Latte
card1.description: Double espresso with strictly steamed oat milk, real vanilla bean and a rich artisanal caramel drizzle. 🌸

card2.title: Fresh Bites in Bloom
card2.description: Enjoy light, vibrant artisan pastries inspired by the sweetness of spring — made to brighten every moment. 🌷
